ddls:
CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "fracode" TEXT /* Fraction code for the respondent's location */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the survey */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the respondent (male/female) */,
  "momage" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent's mother */,
  "momedu" TEXT /* Education level of the respondent's mother */,
  "momheight" REAL /* Height of the respondent's mother */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the respondent */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the respondent */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the respondent */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the household */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location (city, town, village) of the respondent */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the respondent's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the respondent's location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the respondent for follow-up */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent for follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent the indicator belongs to */,
  "whz" REAL /* Weight-for-height z-score */,
  "aged" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent in months */,
  "Nlt18" INTEGER /* Number of children under 18 in the household */,
  "Ncomp" INTEGER /* Number of household members who completed primary education */,
  "watmin" INTEGER /* Whether the household has access to improved water */,
  "elec" INTEGER /* Whether the household has electricity */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Type of floor material used in the household */,
  "walls" INTEGER /* Type of wall material used in the household */,
  "roof" INTEGER /* Type of roof material used in the household */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index of the respondent */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure levels of the respondent */,
  "cholesterol" REAL /* Cholesterol levels of the respondent */,
  "glucose" REAL /* Blood glucose levels of the respondent */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the respondent */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status of the respondent */,
  "physical_activity" TEXT /* Physical activity level of the respondent */,
  "mental_health_status" TEXT /* Mental health status of the respondent */,
  "chronic_diseases" TEXT /* Any chronic diseases the respondent has (e.g., diabetes, hypertension) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent the asset belongs to */,
  "wardrobe" INTEGER /* Whether the household owns a wardrobe */,
  "table" INTEGER /* Whether the household owns a table */,
  "chair" INTEGER /* Whether the household owns a chair */,
  "khat" INTEGER /* Whether the household owns a khat */,
  "chouki" INTEGER /* Whether the household owns a chouki */,
  "tv" INTEGER /* Whether the household owns a TV */,
  "refrig" INTEGER /* Whether the household owns a refrigerator */,
  "bike" INTEGER /* Whether the household owns a bike */,
  "moto" INTEGER /* Whether the household owns a motorcycle */,
  "sewmach" INTEGER /* Whether the household owns a sewing machine */,
  "mobile" INTEGER /* Whether the household owns a mobile phone */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle owned (e.g., car, motorcycle) */,
  "house_type" TEXT /* Type of house (e.g., apartment, detached house) */,
  "house_area" REAL /* Area of the house in square meters */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Primary source of water (e.g., tap, well, river) */,
  "sanitation_facility" TEXT /* Type of sanitation facility (e.g., toilet, latrine) */,
  "cooking_fuel" TEXT /* Type of fuel used for cooking (e.g., gas, wood, electricity) */,
  "internet_access" TEXT /* Whether the household has internet access (yes/no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food security status */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent the status belongs to */,
  "hfiacat" TEXT /* Household food insecurity access category */,
  "food_sources" TEXT /* Primary sources of food (e.g., market, farm, aid) */,
  "food_storage" TEXT /* Methods of food storage (e.g., refrigerator, pantry) */,
  "food_preparation" TEXT /* Methods of food preparation (e.g., cooking, raw) */,
  "food_diversity" TEXT /* Diversity of food consumed (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "meal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of meals (e.g., 3 times a day, 2 times a day) */,
  "food_insecurity_reasons" TEXT /* Reasons for food insecurity (e.g., lack of money, lack of access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_security_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)
